cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this problem step by step. First, I need to figure out when Jennifer could have gone to the swimming pool based on the given information. So, the times she was busy are: - 5am to 8am (office) - 12pm to 1pm (library) - 1pm to 2pm (bike shop) - 2pm to 9pm (electronics store) - 9pm to 10pm (Statue of Liberty) The gaps between these activities might be when she was free.
